description: Escalate the ticket 'Payment Gateway Integration Failure' by setting the Priority to 'Urgent' and assigning it to the 'Support Group'. Include the internal comment: 'Escalating to L2 Support: Customer has experienced downtime for over 4 hours. Requires immediate API log review.'

metadata.expected_comment: Escalating to L2 Support: Customer has experienced downtime for over 4 hours. Requires immediate API log review.
